name: trip-forge
description: Generate thoroughly researched, executable travel plans as self-contained HTML reports.

interface.shortDescription: Generate complete, mobile-friendly HTML travel plans.
interface.longDescription: Research current travel information and create a relaxed, weather-aware, executable itinerary as a complete self-contained HTML report.
defaultPrompt: Create a complete HTML travel plan for my next trip.
Research my destination and build a weather-aware itinerary.
Generate a mobile-friendly travel report with backup plans.
